title: Chose to duplicate or not duplicate subitems
excerpt:
It would be nice if you had the choice to duplicate subitems when duplicating a main item. 
Instead of having to delete all sub items when duplicating items.

posts.author: mackdodge (Mack Dodge)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice if you had the choice to duplicate subitems when duplicating a main item.
